name: Baking Mix
recipeIngredient: 8 cups all-purpose flour (or 4 cups each all-purpose flour and whole wheat flour)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the all-purpose flour (or equal parts all-purpose flour and whole wheat flour), baking powder, salt, cream of tartar, baking soda, and dry nonfat milk.
- If using a large mixer, blend for best results, but a pastry blender will also work well to incorporate the shortening.
2. Gradually add about half a cup of shortening at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition until the mixture is crumbly.
3. Transfer the mix to an air-tight container and store in the refrigerator or at room temperature. Use within approximately 3 months.
YIELD: about 12 cups of mix
For Biscuits:
- Mix 2 cups of Baking Mix with 1/2 cup water. Bake at 450°F for 8-10 minutes.
For Muffins:
- Mix 2 cups of Baking Mix with 2 tablespoons sugar, 1 beaten egg, and 2/3 cup milk. Bake at 400°F for 15 minutes.
For Pancakes:
- Mix 2 cups of baking mix with 1 beaten egg and 1 1/3 cups milk.
For Waffles:
- Mix 2 cups of Baking Mix with 1 beaten egg, 2 tablespoons oil, and 1 1/3 cups milk.
